name: Example Owner
role: Designer, Engineer, Builder — Principal & Founder, Example Studio
summary: Example Owner designs, engineers, and ships AI products end-to-end. He works across the full stack — product design and design systems, data science and ML pipelines, and agentic architecture. He builds AI into products and uses AI to build. His range spans sole technical founder to embedded partner with engineering teams of eleven. He thinks in systems and holds design, engineering, and product in the same head, which removes an entire class of translation errors and ships better software faster.
values: Clarity — the best products come from someone who can hold the user's experience and the technical architecture simultaneously.
Systems thinking — brand, architecture, and interface are one discipline, not three.
Compression over handoff — fewer translation layers between design, engineering, and product produces better outcomes.
Craft at every layer — from semantic design tokens to ML temporal validation boundaries.
Small by conviction — one senior builder augmented by AI, embedded with the team.
AI as force multiplier — AI-assisted development is a genuine velocity shift, not a gimmick.
Ship the thing — product quality and methodology over marketing spend.
Evidence over assertion — backtest, measure, validate before claiming results.

positioning.summary: Design engineer and technical founder who builds AI products from zero across every layer — product design, design systems, full-stack engineering, ML pipelines, and agentic architecture. Operates as sole founder or embedded partner with engineering teams; compresses the design-engineering handoff to ship faster, cleaner software.
work_priorities: Build and scale Example Forecast Lab — synthetic forecasting prediction + decision automation platform.
Run Example Studio engagements as embedded design-engineering partner.
Advance agentic architecture practice (LangGraph, OpenAI Agent Kit, Anthropic Agent SDK, multi-agent orchestration).
Coach engineering teams to sustained high velocity with AI-assisted development.
Design and ship design systems with 1:1 Figma-to-code mapping and semantic tokens.
life_priorities: Health and well-being (prior career break Oct 2021 – Jul 2022).
Remote life based in Los Angeles / Venice.
constraints: Small studio by conviction — one senior builder model.
Prefers sole-founder or embedded-partner engagements over large team hierarchies.
Zero marketing spend model for Example Forecast Lab; funded on product quality.

open_threads: How should Example Forecast Lab evolve beyond current subscriber base and trading stack?
Where is the next frontier for Example Studio engagements?
What is the right long-term vehicle for the prediction-engine IP and methodology?
How to scale the AI-assisted velocity coaching practice without losing craft?

projects.summary: 11-service AI platform for synthetic forecasting, built from zero as design engineer / sole technical founder (2025–present). Next.js 15 + React 19 web, SwiftUI iOS, Kotlin/Jetpack Compose Android, RevenueCat payments. Conversational AI via LangGraph with multi-model routing (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq) and SSE streaming tool calls for live synthetic scenarios. Proprietary factor-discovery prediction engine (XGBoost, LightGBM) with three-window temporal validation and market-aware evaluation after the ~4.5% vig. Decision automation on NautilusTrader + Kalshi with Redis-backed control state, circuit breakers, daily P&L monitoring. Real-time data pipeline from ESPN, SportsGameOdds, BallDontLie; dbt analytics with Dagster orchestration. Research tool 'Example Research Shell' (terminal agent on Bun with WhatsApp gateway). Results: positive ROI across every synthetic forecast type (improved calibration across all synthetic forecast categories) validated on 1,000+ synthetic evaluations. 50 pilot users, weekly active cohort, no paid acquisition.

Creative technology studio — Principal + Founder since 2021. One senior builder, augmented by AI, embedded with client teams. many products shipped, many launch impressions. Engagements span AI transformation, frontend architecture, design systems, brand identity, and zero-to-one product.

AI Transformation & Frontend Architecture engagement. Embedded with 11-person engineering team. Designed complete UI/UX for a browser-based SQL IDE. Built 66-component design system on Radix/shadcn/ui with Tailwind CSS 4. Monaco Editor integration with multi-dialect SQL tokenizers. Coached the team from 50 commits/week to 300+ sustained (high velocity increase).

Conversational Health AI. Sole designer-engineer. Designed a 7-phase clinical conversation arc (Mirror, System Explanation, Reframe, Keystone Action, What NOT to Do, Tracking Prompt, Anchoring Truth). Built a 5-category persistent memory system and multi-store RAG across four vector stores. Three persona modes: Guide, Deep Dive, Practitioner. early waitlist. Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, Python/FastAPI, OpenAI Agent Kit, Mem0, Redis, PostgreSQL.

Co-founder. HR Consultant Marketplace — CRM + marketplace for independent HR consultants. Led product strategy from 80 user interviews through launch. Designed client workspaces, cross-client dashboard, marketplace, invoicing. Built brand identity and investor materials. Raised small pre-seed round.

Luxury wellness brand. Brand identity, web experience (Framer), physical space integration. Dark-and-gold palette, infinity moonmark logomark. Took the brand from zero patients to six weeks fully booked.

Logistics Compliance SaaS. Rebuilt the design system with engineering-grade structure — semantic tokens, 1:1 Figma-to-code mapping. Co-designed rules-engine taxonomy for ML-powered invoice auditing. Redesigned onboarding from a 2-month human process into a 2-week software pipeline. Clients include True Classic, Magic Spoon, Seed Health, Nood.

Sports & commerce platform across three surfaces: consumer mobile (GPS, shot tracking, 8+ game modes), on-course ordering with cart GPS delivery, and a web admin with POS integration. Designed for direct sunlight readability and one-handed use. Recognized at SXSW; Alberta Innovates grant recipient.

Director, Product Design. Joined as employee #2 at 5 people, seed funding. Grew over 6 years from first design hire to Director of Product Design reporting to the CEO. Built the entire customer-facing product from scratch (onboarding, compliance management, employee records, HR policy library, communication hub, termination compliance workflow) and the internal HR manager platform for 200+ HR managers (unified client timeline, customer context, guided compliance workflows). Designed the conversion funnel (primary revenue engine), adaptive onboarding, and the 5-tier pricing system. Built the 'Example Design System' design system. Produced investor decks and Figma prototypes supporting staged capital raised across seed–Series C. Managed a team of 3 designers. Company went $0 → growth-stage revenue, growth-stage valuation, 5 → 200 employees, 0 → many customers served.

Co-Founder / Designer + Engineer. Designed and engineered the first veterinary telehealth platform — category creation before the category existed. Native iOS (Objective-C), native Android (Java), provider web portal (Rails), real-time video on TokBox/OpenTok with reconnection handling for 3G/4G. 20,000+ users, press in Forbes and Yahoo Finance. Mapped the VCPR regulatory boundary that shaped every pet telehealth platform that followed.

Head of Design. Won a competitive brand pitch against 5 agencies at age 24. Created the iconic paint-splattered heart logo. Designed 10,000+ pieces of environmental signage across 18 city blocks of downtown Las Vegas. Built custom CMS + API layer syncing website, mobile app, and artist management. Designed stage graphics, merchandise, maps, wristbands. large attendance on opening day; the festival still runs a decade later.
Creator discovery platform (co-founder). Strategy, branding, UI, UX, code.
Environmental testing dashboards. Complex data visualization under IE9 constraints.

concepts.summary: Holding design, engineering, and product in the same head removes an entire class of translation errors — interfaces get better, architecture gets cleaner, and products ship faster.
Prediction methodology with frozen boundaries and market-aware evaluation after the ~4.5% synthetic-forecasting vig.
Coaching engineering teams to sustain 5–7x commit velocity (e.g., 50/week → 300+/week) through AI-assisted development workflows.
Example Studio's operating model: one senior builder, augmented by AI, embedded with the client team — only works when that person holds design, engineering, and product together.

concepts.concept: Semantic design tokens with 1:1 Figma-to-code mapping
concepts.summary: Engineering-grade design systems where Figma tokens map directly to code tokens without translation drift.

playbooks.summary: Own every layer — design, frontend, backend, data pipeline, ML, agent orchestration — as sole technical founder or embedded partner.
Drop into a client team, rebuild the design system with engineering rigor, and coach velocity upward with AI-assisted workflows.
7-phase health conversation design: Mirror → System Explanation → Reframe → Keystone Action → What NOT to Do → Tracking Prompt → Anchoring Truth.

stances.summary: We think about software the way architects think about light — where it enters, how it moves, what it reveals. The interface is a consequence of that thinking, not the starting point.

stances.stance: Brand, architecture, and interface are one discipline
stances.summary: Most teams fracture them across departments; Example Studio holds them as one.
Not a resource constraint — a product decision. Compression is the feature.

inquiries.summary: What is the right long-term vehicle (product, license, platform) for the factor-discovery + temporal-validation methodology proven on NBA props?
How far can the senior-builder-plus-AI model scale before craft degrades or another model is needed?
Which agentic patterns (LangGraph vs. Agent Kit vs. Anthropic Agent SDK) are durable vs. transient as the tooling shifts?

degrees: BS Advertising Art Direction (School of Journalism & Mass Communication)
